category_title: Conscientious ELL student who views reading as a practical tool
scenario_title: Sustained silent reading with difficult or uninteresting texts
minimal_context: Jesus is participating in a sustained silent reading period in his English class.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Jesus, please read this text silently for the next forty-five minutes.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: Okay, but reading is a boring activity when I have to do it for long periods of time.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: This topic is of little interest to me, and the words are hard to understand.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Looking over at certain students in the class) I can't. I'm getting easily distracted by them, and that makes reading unappealing.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Jesus, please read this text silently for the next forty-five minutes.

STUDENT: Okay, but reading is a boring activity when I have to do it for long periods of time.

TUTOR: Keep trying to read.

STUDENT: This topic is of little interest to me, and the words are hard to understand.

TUTOR: Just focus on your book.

STUDENT: (Looking over at certain students in the class) I can't. I'm getting easily distracted by them, and that makes reading unappealing.
